title: Your System Title
objective: Describe what this system must control or protect in one sentence.

components.label: Human-Readable Label
components.description: Describe this signal's purpose in the system.

logic_nodes.label: LN1
logic_nodes.description: Describe the logic gate: what conditions must be met and what it drives.

acceptance_scenarios.label: Your Scenario Label
acceptance_scenarios.description: Describe the engineer-supplied process this scenario verifies.

steady_signals.note: Baseline value before the transition starts.

fault_modes.symptom: Describe what the operator or maintenance crew would observe.
fault_modes.optimization_prompt: Describe what guardrail or redundancy should be added after this fault is understood.

onboarding_questions.prompt: What is the format of the input documents: structured table, Markdown/Notion, PDF, or mixed?
onboarding_questions.rationale: Determines whether to build a document adapter first or require engineers to整理为 unified spec.

onboarding_questions.prompt: Is each component a binary switch, fixed level, discrete state, or continuous analog? What are the units and legal ranges?
onboarding_questions.rationale: Prevents mixing different signal shapes into one incorrect monitoring curve.
onboarding_questions.required_for: Monitoring curve simulation and fault injection

onboarding_questions.prompt: Is the engineer-supplied process event-driven, rate-driven, or a state machine with delays/hysteresis? Which nodes allow hold/saturation?
onboarding_questions.rationale: Determines how to convert A/B process docs into strictly replayable timelines.

onboarding_questions.prompt: What fault injection types does the new system need to support: stuck, short, open, false-alarm, delay, threshold drift, or other?
onboarding_questions.rationale: Determines the scope of diagnostic trees, reasoning document templates, and optimization suggestions.
